creator: marc@mpeters.org
text:

make: stopped in /usr/ports/x11/xdm

Fix: 

Add NO_STAGE:= yes to Makefile

As this worked before (9.2-RELEASE), this is no real solution.
How-To-Repeat: portmaster -d x11/xdm
